panels.title: Incheon Airport
panels.scene: Jet lagged team — Logan films on iPad.

panels.title: Customs Line [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan films MV's passport stamp — MV swats iPad down.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Not everything is content." · Logan: "This is definitely content."

panels.title: Language Barrier
panels.scene: Ariana holds phrasebook — Kian points at wrong word — vendor confused.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "I said thank you." · Kieryn: "You said spicy grandmother."

panels.title: Bus to Venue
panels.scene: Wide — team bus crosses bridge — Seoul/Busan skyline — scale hits.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Bigger than any flyer we ever saw.*

panels.title: Hotel Check-In
panels.scene: Logan tries to jump on bed — TJ blocks with one arm — injury tape visible.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Hotel rules. And my knee rules harder."

panels.title: Room Assignments
panels.scene: MV clipboard — Ethan + Logan room — Kieryn + Ariana — Kian + TJ.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Lights out by ten. Tournament isn't a field trip."

panels.title: Jet Lag Spar [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV light footwork in hallway — no gear — team copies half-asleep.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Your body lands today. Your brain lands tomorrow."

panels.title: Logan's iPad Map
panels.scene: Logan pins arena on map — zooms — crowd capacity number visible.

panels.title: Ethan Window
panels.scene: Ethan alone at hotel window — city lights — dobok bag on chair.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Prime said international. They never showed us international.*

panels.title: Team Dinner Arrival
panels.scene: MV leads to hotel restaurant — Korean staff bow — team awkward bow back.

panels.title: Banchan Chaos [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan stacks side dishes — Kieryn educates — Ariana already eating precisely.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "That's not a tower. That's a war crime."

panels.title: MV Korean
panels.scene: MV orders in Korean — table goes quiet — Kieryn grins.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Coach's secret weapon: he practiced too."

panels.title: TJ Ice Bath
panels.scene: TJ knee in ice bucket — Ethan sits beside — no words.

panels.title: Weigh-In Poster [TEACH]
panels.scene: Hallway poster — bracket divisions −45 / −51 / −58 — dates circled.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Read your weight. Read your name. Read it twice."

panels.title: First Arena Glimpse
panels.scene: Team peeks through venue doors — empty octagon — Korean flags — scale silence.

panels.title: Kieryn Trash Talk Korean
panels.scene: Kieryn reads opponent board — translates under breath — grins at Kian.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Busan kid called us tourists." · Kian: "Good."

panels.title: Logan Filming Pledge
panels.scene: MV takes iPad — sets timer — returns it.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Film corners. Film meals. Not opponents' passwords."

panels.title: Night Prayer Mat
panels.scene: Ariana stretches alone — Mr. Yang text bubble on phone — thumbs up emoji.

panels.title: Lights Out Fail
panels.scene: Dark room — Logan whisper glow — Ethan shoves pillow.

panels.title: Chapter End Wide
panels.scene: Hotel exterior — tournament banner lit — six room lights go dark one by one.

panels.title: Kieryn Translates [HAIKYUU]
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "He said your stance looks like a traffic cone." · Logan: "What's a cone?"

panels.title: Guest Coach Demo [TEACH]
panels.scene: Korean coach demonstrates guard — points at Ethan's hips — Kieryn translates deadpan.
panels.dialogue: Guest Coach: *(Korean)* · Kieryn: "Your base is a polite suggestion."

panels.title: Kian Claps Back
panels.scene: Kian bows — asks Kieryn how to say "I'll prove it" — coach laughs despite himself.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Say it." · Kieryn: "He understood you anyway."

panels.title: Logan Cone Stance [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan exaggerates traffic-cone stance — team dies — MV does not.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Fix it before someone films you for the wrong reasons."

panels.title: Translation Sass
panels.scene: Kieryn translates MV's technical cue — adds editorial.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Chin down." · Kieryn: "He said chin down. I'd add 'and stop flinching like a cat.'"

panels.title: Ariana Silent Fix
panels.scene: Ariana adjusts foot angle — coach nods — no translation needed.

panels.title: TJ Injury Check
panels.scene: Korean physio examines TJ knee — MV watches — Kieryn translates medical terms.

panels.title: Bracket Screen [Blue Lock pressure]
panels.scene: Digital bracket — names populate — **elimination single-line** overlay — half the field gone by lunch.

panels.title: Ethan Reads Name
panels.scene: Ethan finds **Lee Ji-woo** — Busan — flag — taller stat line.

panels.title: Team Huddle Translate
panels.scene: MV gives corner signals in English — Kieryn mirrors in Korean for officials — seamless.
panels.dialogue: MV: "We don't need loud. We need clear."

panels.title: Korean Athletes Warm-Up
panels.scene: Younger athletes — cleaner kicks — Kwon's team watches — respect not envy.

panels.title: Kieryn Brother Text
panels.scene: Phone inset — brother: *Don't embarrass the surname* — Kieryn types: *Try.*

panels.title: Logan Interviews MV
panels.scene: Logan iPad interview — MV answers one word — walks off frame.

panels.title: Sass Shield
panels.scene: Opponent team trash talk — Kieryn smiles — translates only the useful parts.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "They said we're loud. Logan, prove them right later."

panels.title: Language of Spar
panels.scene: Ethan spars Korean partner — no shared words — rhythm only — bow at end.

panels.title: Coach Roast Round 2
panels.scene: Guest coach points at Logan's guard — Kieryn: "He said umbrella in a hurricane."

panels.title: MV Proud Glance
panels.scene: MV watches Kieryn handle officials — small nod — clipboard lowered.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *She's not just translating. She's leading.*

panels.title: Team Phrase Drill
panels.scene: Kieryn teaches team one Korean phrase — bow — **감사합니다** — in unison.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Say it like you mean it."

panels.title: Stance Fixed
panels.scene: Ethan corrected stance — coach tap on shoulder — traffic cone joke retired.

panels.title: Chapter End — Kieryn Wink
panels.scene: Kieryn catches Logan still doing cone stance in mirror — wink — Logan fixes it.

panels.title: First Night Market [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Team eats street food — TJ carries Logan on shoulders to see stall.

panels.title: Street Food Roulette
panels.scene: Logan points at mystery skewer — Ariana identifies it — Kian buys anyway.

panels.title: TJ Shoulder Ride
panels.scene: TJ lifts Logan over crowd — Logan films POV — MV rubs temple.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Best seat in Korea!" · MV: "Put him down before he becomes a weapon."

panels.title: Kieryn Orders
panels.scene: Kieryn negotiates at stall — vendor laughs — extra portion — team cheers.

panels.title: Ethan Tries Spice
panels.scene: Ethan bites spicy rice cake — frozen smile — water handed by TJ.

panels.title: Team Photo Booth
panels.scene: Logan drags team into market photo strip — silly faces — Ariana almost smiles.

panels.title: MV Buys Everyone Drink
panels.scene: MV hands warm cups — rare treat — team surprised.

panels.title: Neon Alley Wide
panels.scene: Wide — neon signs — steam — six silhouettes — Haikyuu travel episode energy.

panels.title: Kian Wins Game
panels.scene: Street game stall — Kian wins small prize — gives it to Logan.

panels.title: Ariana People-Watch
panels.scene: Ariana notes fighters from other schools — bandaged knuckles — catalogues tells.

panels.title: Logan Food Vlog
panels.scene: Logan narrates iPad — "Day one — still alive" — Ethan photobombs serious face.

panels.title: Team Race Stalls
panels.scene: MV times sprint through market — not gear — pure joy — Kieryn trips Kian — legal.

panels.title: Busan Breeze
panels.scene: Ethan at river walk — market behind — city sound — Logan on TJ shoulders in background.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *We left Prime. We found this.*

panels.title: Shared Cup [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: One last skewer — passed hand to hand — six bites — team ritual.

panels.title: Vendor Bow
panels.scene: Team bows to vendor — vendor bows back — Kieryn thanks in Korean.

panels.title: MV Alone Moment
panels.scene: MV buys single tea — watches team laugh — doesn't join — smiles anyway.

panels.title: Logan Gift
panels.scene: Logan buys cheap keychain for Ethan — "Korea MVP" — Ethan accepts — no joke back.

panels.title: Curfew Sprint
panels.scene: Team runs for hotel — MV jogs behind — not angry — tournament eve energy.

panels.title: Window Lineup
panels.scene: Hotel windows — six faces — market lights below — last breath before war.

panels.title: Chapter End Wide
panels.scene: Night market from above — team vanishing into hotel — tournament banner flickers.

panels.title: Pro Dojang Tour
panels.scene: Athletes younger — scarier. Ethan quiet.

panels.title: Ninety Seconds Three Stories [TEACH]
panels.scene: Korean guest coach — round timer overlay 1:30.
panels.dialogue: Coach: "Ninety seconds is three stories. Beginning. Middle. End."

panels.title: Beginning Beat
panels.scene: Coach claps — **0:00–0:30** overlay — probe distance — feint only.

panels.title: Middle Beat
panels.scene: **0:30–1:00** overlay — exchange volume — scoreboard ticks.

panels.title: End Beat
panels.scene: **1:00–1:30** overlay — clinch break — final cut kick — bell.
panels.dialogue: Coach: "End — win the round or lose with posture."

panels.title: Younger Athletes Spar [ACTION]
panels.scene: Kids **younger than Ethan** — spinning head kick — clean — PSS flash.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *They're not showing off. They're normal here.*

panels.title: Logan Awe
panels.scene: Logan's iPad lowers — mouth open — rare silence.

panels.title: National Flags Wall
panels.scene: Wall of flags — medals — photos — Kwon's team small in frame.

panels.title: Prime Flash [FLASH inset]
panels.scene: **FLASH** — Prime brochure **"ELITE INTERNATIONAL"** — empty local mat — **CUT PRESENT**.

panels.title: Recovery Station
panels.scene: Ice baths — compression — sports science staff — Kwon's team sees real pipeline.

panels.title: Kieryn Notes
panels.scene: Kieryn films footwork — not for vlog — study mode — brother stream chat ignored.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn (internal): *Shadow them before they shadow you.*

panels.title: Kian Humbled
panels.scene: Kian spars — gets tagged twice — laughs — resets — no performance rage.

panels.title: Ariana Precision Drill
panels.scene: Coach holds target — Ariana punch-cut chain — coach nods once.

panels.title: TJ Limited Reps
panels.scene: TJ shadow kicks only — physio tape — watches teammates full spar — jaw tight.

panels.title: MV Translation
panels.scene: MV repeats coach's three-stories line in English — team repeats — ritual.

panels.title: Electronic Gear Check [TEACH]
panels.scene: PSS gear calibration line — sensors tested — Ethan watches LED flash demo.
panels.dialogue: Staff: *(Korean)* · Kieryn: "If it beeps, it counts. Argue later."

panels.title: Scale of Crowd Seats
panels.scene: Team stands in empty 10k seats — Logan spins — vertigo.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Our whole town fits in one section."

panels.title: Coach Nod Exchange
panels.scene: Korean coach nods at MV — mutual respect — two schools same language.

panels.title: Ethan Quiet
panels.scene: Ethan alone on mat edge — dobok tied — eyes on younger athletes.

panels.title: Chapter End — Timer Freeze
panels.scene: Giant **1:30** timer graphic — three story labels — chapter end card.

panels.title: Team Reacts
panels.scene: Silence — Kieryn doesn't joke — TJ hand on Ethan's shoulder — weight.

panels.title: Prime Brochure Memory [FLASH]
panels.scene: **FLASH** — young Ethan holding Prime flyer — gold foil — parents proud — **CUT**.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *They sold us the font. Not the footwork.*

panels.title: MV Honest
panels.scene: MV crouches to Ethan's height — eye level — no pep talk.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You weren't close. You were brave anyway."

panels.title: Logan Defensive
panels.scene: Logan: "Prime still sucked." — Ethan small nod — agreement without debate.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "We knew that." · Ethan: "We didn't know *this*."

panels.title: Kian Anger Redirect
panels.scene: Kian punches pad hard — MV catches — redirects to form drill.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Save it for someone wearing hogu."

panels.title: Ariana Acceptance
panels.scene: Ariana wraps knuckles — calm — already knew — father voice memo plays once.
panels.dialogue: Mr. Yang (V.O.): "Real level doesn't insult you. It teaches you."

panels.title: Kieryn Lists Gap
panels.scene: Kieryn whiteboard — three columns — **speed / distance / corner** — fills honestly.

panels.title: Training Montage Beat
panels.scene: Triple panel — footwork / stretch / ice — same hour — no music fluff — work.

panels.title: Ethan Spar Loss
panels.scene: Ethan loses gym spar — bows — no tantrum — Arc 3 growth visible.
panels.dialogue: Partner: *(Korean — respect)* · Kieryn: "He said good round."

panels.title: Neverending Endurance Seed
panels.scene: MV makes Ethan repeat round-three footwork drill — timer — no stop.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Round three isn't magic. It's mileage."

panels.title: Team Eats Silent
panels.scene: Cafeteria — team eats — quieter than night market — focus mode on.

panels.title: Bracket Posted [Blue Lock pressure]
panels.scene: Ethan finds his name — Ji-woo above — **single elimination** arrow — red line.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Win or watch from the stands."

panels.title: TJ Captain Speech
panels.scene: TJ stands — knee taped — one sentence — sits — no sermon.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "We didn't fly here to lie to ourselves again."

panels.title: Logan Vows Quiet
panels.scene: Logan closes iPad — first time all trip — hands to Ethan.

panels.title: Night Run
panels.scene: Ethan night jog — hotel loop — city blur — breath visible.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Close isn't a insult. It's a coordinate.*

panels.title: MV Office Light
panels.scene: MV alone — reviews tape — Korean opponents — circles names — Ethan on top.

panels.title: Team Lights Out
panels.scene: Dark room — six breathing sync — tournament tomorrow — Haikyuu eve hush.

panels.title: Ethan Gear Check
panels.scene: Ethan lays out dobok — hogu — tape — methodical — no superstition — routine.

panels.title: Chapter End Line
panels.scene: Close on Ethan's eyes — open — alarm beeps — **Chapter 77 incoming energy**.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *We weren't even close before. Fine. Start close today.*

panels.title: Team Sync Drill [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kwon's team footwork line — Korean coaches nod approval.

panels.title: Line Formation
panels.scene: Six in row — same step — same beat — MV counts in Korean.

panels.title: Guest Coach Joins
panels.scene: Korean coach steps in line — leads tempo faster — team struggles — then syncs.

panels.title: Kieryn Front
panels.scene: Kieryn moved to front — pace-setter — hair streak whip — team follows.

panels.title: Logan Almost Trips
panels.scene: Logan stumbles — Ethan catches elbow — line doesn't break — recovery.

panels.title: Ariana Metronome
panels.scene: Close on Ariana feet — exact timing — bandaged hands still — precision.

panels.title: Kian Power Control
panels.scene: Kian softens power — matches line — discipline visible — MV nod.

panels.title: TJ Shadow Line
panels.scene: TJ runs shadow line behind team — no jumps — captain template.

panels.title: Coaches Applaud
panels.scene: Korean coaches clap once — rare — Kwon's team bows — mutual.

panels.title: MV Small Smile
panels.scene: MV same line as arc 2 — clipboard down — *same book different page* face.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *Now we're in the same book.*

panels.title: Chain Drill [ACTION]
panels.scene: Pair chain — cut kick pass down line — each tags next — speed builds.

panels.title: Corner Echo Practice
panels.scene: Team benches — practice corner calls — **TWO UP** — **HANDS UP** — Haikyuu rhythm.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Corner is a instrument. Play together."

panels.title: Korean Team Watches
panels.scene: Rival school watches — impressed — Kieryn nods once — respect earned pre-fight.

panels.title: Ethan Anchor
panels.scene: Ethan center of sync drill — not loudest — steadiest — TJ points at him.

panels.title: Water Break Banter
panels.scene: Logan: "We're scary good." · Kieryn: "We're scary less bad." · Team laughs.

panels.title: Final Sync Run
panels.scene: Full speed line — camera pan — six blur — coaches stand — tournament ready.

panels.title: Bow Out
panels.scene: Team bow to Korean staff — staff bow back — ceremony not performance.

panels.title: Gear Load
panels.scene: Team loads gear bus — Logan counts heads — MV checks list — departure.

panels.title: Arena Approach
panels.scene: Bus turns corner — arena appears — collective inhale — Blue Lock scale.

panels.title: Chapter End — In Step
panels.scene: Team walks to venue entrance — same footfall — accidental sync — hold frame.

panels.title: Fighter VS Cards [CARD] ★
panels.scene: **Ethan Hyun** vs **Lee Ji-woo** (Busan Youth) — Korea regional.

panels.title: Round 1 Loss
panels.scene: Round 1 ends — Ethan behind — adjusts guard — no panic.

panels.title: Round 2 Trade [ACTION]
panels.scene: **Cut kick exchange** — both score — activity mounting.

panels.title: Round 3 Clock [ACTION]
panels.scene: Score tied — **0:30** on timer — MV corner: *"Outwork."*

panels.title: Body Roundhouse +2 [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan **back-leg roundhouse** trunk — PSS flash — stays in stance.

panels.title: Answer Cut [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ji-woo **cut kick** — Ethan **checks** — no retreat.

panels.title: Clinch Punch +1 [TEACH + ACTION]
panels.scene: Break clinch — Ethan **straight punch** hogu — judge signals **+1**.
panels.dialogue: MV: "One point is still a point!"

panels.title: Final Exchange [ACTION]
panels.scene: Both tired — Ethan **more active** — footwork bounce — Olympic activity win energy.

panels.title: Round 3 Win [TEACH]
panels.scene: Bell — Ethan wins round on points — **match may still be lost** — moral endurance.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You outworked them. Points aren't the only language."

panels.title: Yuna Thread Inset [short]
panels.scene: Poomsae stands — Yuna's bag — **Pineapple Fanta packed, never given** — Ethan loses on points (wide) — fingers on cold can until flat — drinks on hotel bus — *Not yet. Wrong moment.*

panels.title: Arena Wide [ACTION]
panels.scene: Octagon wide — Korean flags — name boards — crowd 10× local — **Blue Lock** elimination scale.

panels.title: Guard Bounce [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan vs Ji-woo — side-on guards — referee center — score 0–0 R1.

panels.title: Ji-woo Cut Rhythm [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ji-woo **3× front-leg cut kicks** — Ethan too respectful — eats second — PSS **+2** opponent.

panels.title: Round 1 Bell [TEACH]
panels.scene: Round 1 ends — scoreboard shows Ethan down — Ethan exhales — adjusts guard — **no panic**.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You gave him round one. Don't give him round three."

panels.title: Corner Inset [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Full corner — six faces — Logan muted — Kieryn towel — TJ fist bump — not Prime alone.

panels.title: Feint Body [ACTION]
panels.scene: Round 2 — Ethan feint body — Ji-woo drops guard — Ethan **doesn't spin** — discipline from Arc 3.

panels.title: PCA Read [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ji-woo commits cut — Ethan **turns with** — **back kick +2** — Pattern E seed — guard up.

panels.title: Scoreboard Tied [ACTION]
panels.scene: Round 3 start — cumulative tied — **match win still uphill** — timer **1:30**.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Win this round like it's the whole match."

panels.title: Match Result Board [Blue Lock pressure]
panels.scene: Final decision — Ethan **loses match on points** — wins round 3 — board flashes **ELIMINATED** for bracket path.
panels.dialogue: Announcer: *(Korean)* · Kieryn: "Round three yours. Match theirs. Next cycle."

panels.title: Bow & Huddle [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Ji-woo bow — Ethan bow — TJ pulls Ethan into team huddle — **Neverending Endurance** named.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Prime never taught you round three." · Ethan: "That's why I'm here."

panels.title: TJ Emperor's Kick
panels.scene: Injury managed — clean power score **+2**.

panels.title: Arena Wide [ACTION]
panels.scene: TJ vs Korean −58 kg — knee tape visible — crowd roar — **Blue Lock** bracket single loss.

panels.title: Guard Tight [ACTION]
panels.scene: TJ guard high — chin tucked — no showboat — Emperor's Kick chamber hidden.

panels.title: Opponent Pressure [ACTION]
panels.scene: Opponent cut kick spam — TJ absorbs — limp readable — corner watches.

panels.title: Cut Kick Close [ACTION]
panels.scene: TJ **front-leg cut** closes distance — Pattern C setup — opponent guard opens.

panels.title: Emperor's Kick Impact [ACTION] ★
panels.scene: **Turning body kick +4** — PSS flash — opponent skids — slow-mo hip rotation inset.

panels.title: Scoreboard Pop [TEACH]
panels.scene: Scoreboard **+4** — team corner erupts — **TWO UP** echo — Logan illegal loud.

panels.title: Opponent Answer [ACTION]
panels.scene: Opponent head kick attempt — TJ block — knee wobble — hides it — grit.

panels.title: Round Trade [ACTION]
panels.scene: Volume exchange — both +2 — activity even — timer **0:15**.

panels.title: Round Win [TEACH]
panels.scene: Round to TJ on activity — honorable or full win — team inspired regardless.

panels.title: Ice Between Rounds
panels.scene: Corner — ice on knee — Ethan holds towel — TJ breathing controlled.

panels.title: Mountain Strike Tease [ACTION]
panels.scene: Round 2 — TJ mat stomp rhythm break — **cut head +3** attempt — near miss — crowd gasps.

panels.title: Honorable Loss Path [Blue Lock pressure]
panels.scene: Match loss on points possible — TJ grins anyway — respect over trophy.

panels.title: Team Chant
panels.scene: Stands — Kwon's chants **EMPEROR** — Korean crowd joins rhythm — cross-cultural.

panels.title: Bow Deep
panels.scene: TJ deep bow — opponent deep bow — sportsmanship — knee tremor only on exit.

panels.title: MV Hand on Shoulder
panels.scene: MV no words — hand on TJ shoulder — TJ leans briefly — trust.

panels.scene: Logan iPad shake — proud tears — tries to hide — Kieryn blocks lens.

panels.title: Kian Fired Up
panels.scene: Kian shadow kicks in tunnel — fired up — discipline next chapter seed.

panels.title: TJ Bench Captain

panels.scene: Slow-mo Emperor's Kick freeze — **+4** graphic — chapter title card **CH 78**.

panels.scene: Kian waits — counters instead of spinning wild.

panels.title: Opponent Discipline [ACTION]
panels.scene: Korean opponent — textbook guard — no trash talk — Kian grins — predator vs wall.

panels.scene: Referee breaks clinch — Kian doesn't grab — hands up — legal reset.

panels.title: Counter Roundhouse [ACTION]

panels.scene: Guest coach from Ch 74 watches — nods at MV — Kian noticed — pride.

panels.title: Kieryn Sass Approval
panels.scene: Kieryn: "You didn't embarrass us." — Kian: "High praise from you."

panels.title: Chapter End

panels.title: Kieryn Crowd Moment [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: 100 Shadow Kick — crowd gasps. Brother watches stream at home (optional inset).

panels.title: Arena Entrance [ACTION]
panels.scene: Kieryn enters — hair streak — grin — crowd noise rises — showtime.

panels.title: Brother Stream Inset [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: **Inset** — brother on couch — stream chat flying — leans forward — *Don't embarrass the surname*.

panels.scene: Kieryn **3× cut kicks** — Pattern A setup — opponent frustrated — PSS ticks.

panels.title: Opponent Closes [ACTION]

panels.scene: Feint chain — speed lines — **NOT wire-fu** — legal rapid cuts — crowd rises.

panels.scene: Read opponent cut — **spinning head kick +5** — PSS flash — judges turning flag.

panels.title: Compare Arc 8 Ghost
panels.scene: Ghost overlay — Arc 8 final photo pose — younger — same formation — time echo.

panels.title: Individual Copies
panels.scene: Each gets print — holds differently — Ethan flat — Kieryn rolled — character.

panels.title: Bow to Dojang
panels.scene: Team bows dojang — empty morning — flags — gratitude — not victory lap.

panels.title: Airport Home
panels.scene: Airport departures — medals in carry-on — sleep on shoulders — Haikyuu travel end.

panels.title: MV Last Look
panels.scene: MV last look Korea skyline — window — notebook closed — Arc 6 complete.

panels.title: Ethan Photo Pocket
panels.scene: Ethan slips photo in bag — beside gear — not social media — private anchor.

panels.title: Arc 6 End Wide
panels.scene: Plane lifts — Korea shrinks — **ARC 6 END** — Arc 7 hook shadow — U20 path.
